violations.text: Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025

The doors to the outside, located at the entrance (space between 2 doors) and near the drive thru (gap on the side where the door opens), are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025
The floor in the walk-in cooler is not in good repair. A seam has lifted off of the floor. Seam must be properly repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of black/brown residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025

The floor and wall junctures under/behind the 3-bay sink do not have proper coving. Space observed between the wall molding and the floor. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (tomato/veggie slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

The doors to the outside, located at the entrance, observed with a space between the 2 doors. The door located near the drive-thru observed with a small space at the bottom. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have a slight accumulation of black/brown residue. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

The floor in areas throughout the kitchen is in poor repair. Grout has receded below tile level in some areas and cracked tiles also observed. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the mop sink area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

The drain in the fryolator area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris blocking the drain. In addition, a large amount of grease and food observed behind the fryolator line. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
